resources.string: Eye Care 👀 : Every 20 minutes, pause and look 20 feet away for 20 seconds. Your eyes will thank you.
Focus 🧘 : Set it, forget it, get notified when it\'s done.
Quick ⏱️ : Need a 5-minute break? A 15-minute call? Just pick a time and go.
Designed to be fast. Launch timers from the notification itself — no app opening required.

Pausa needs to reach you when it matters — when your timer ends or it\'s time for an eye break. This includes notifications and, if your phone is locked, showing an alert right on your lock screen. Without these, you\'ll miss every timer. Just a clock nobody hears.
To fire exactly on time, Pausa needs permission to set exact alarms. Without it, Android might delay your timers when the device is idle — and a late timer is basically a broken timer.
Tap below to enable exact alarms.
Don\'t let timers sleep on the job.

Android\'s battery optimization can shut down background apps to save power. Since Pausa runs a foreground service to keep your timers alive, it needs to be exempted. Skip this and your timers might stop firing altogether when the screen is off.
Strongly recommended. Tap below to exempt Pausa from battery optimization.
